headline_seed: Venezuela rocked by powerful back-to-back earthquakes - The Guardian
draft_text:
#BreakingMews Two earthquakes struck Venezuela Wednesday evening — a 7.2 foreshock, then a larger 7.5 mainshock 39 seconds later, per the USGS. Buildings collapsed in Caracas. BBC News and CNN confirm no casualty toll yet.

And that's the mews.
